goals: Get help solving a math problem encountered while working on a history class project
Understand the solution through detailed step-by-step explanation
Look up a relevant formula for reference
Practice similar problems to reinforce learning

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and somewhat anxious about math, but motivated to learn. Prefers explanations that connect to real-world contexts.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Comfortable with history and humanities subjects but struggles with math. Does not know tool names or internal APIs. Needs clear, patient explanations.

end_condition: The student has received help solving the math problem, understands the solution steps, has referenced the relevant formula, and has practiced similar problems to build confidence.
